title: How to group items by Label versus Group Name?

posts.author: inbarcicada (Inbar Porat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

I am curious about the capabilities of the table widget in the dashboard. The table is currently grouped by Group Name, but I am wondering if there is any way to group by a specific label instead?

I have a Project Status label that shows if projects are done, in progress, etc., and I would love to be able to look at those grouped together. For ex, I’d like to look at all of my “In Progress” items in a group, versus grouped by their Group Name.

Is there any way around this? Thanks!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @inbarcicada

Welcome to the Community!

I haven’t noticed this as available to the dashboard table widget, but if you work with your main table or a view tab in the actual board, you can use the group by function to view it that way:

image1008×115 14.5 KB

Hopefully that helps!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: That is assuming the Group By feature has been enabled on the account in question. It is not consistent.
